calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-03-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Oct-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BRANDON KOEHNE'S Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents

The motion is denied without prejudice. Within ten (10) calendar days, lead counsel for the parties are ordered to meet and confer in person, or via Zoom or similar platform (with camera on), regarding the requests and responses/objections at issue. Plaintiff will have thirty (30) calendar days from the date of the meet-and-confer meeting to amend/refile the motion with a detailed declaration of what agreements, if any, were arrived at during the meeting.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem John Paul Deol at jpdeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (525/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2023 Set For Trial On Jan-06-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
